# Learn Kanji – JLPT N5 to N1
> iOS flashcard app for learning Japanese kanji using the RTK mnemonic method.

## Overview
Master Japanese kanji from JLPT N5 to N1 using the proven Remembering the Kanji (RTK) method. Study Kanji uses vivid mnemonics and keyword associations to make each character memorable — turning rote memorization into a story-driven learning experience. With 2,000+ kanji organized by JLPT level and a built-in flashcard quiz mode, it suits everyone from absolute beginners working through N5 to advanced learners tackling the full N1 syllabus.

## JLPT Levels Covered
- N5: ~80 kanji
- N4: ~166 kanji
- N3: ~367 kanji
- N2: ~367 kanji
- N1: ~1,232 kanji
- Total: 2,000+ kanji

## The RTK Method
Remembering the Kanji (RTK), developed by James Heisig, teaches kanji through English keywords and imaginative stories rather than stroke-order drilling alone. Each character is linked to a memorable keyword and a short mnemonic story that ties together the kanji's visual components (radicals and primitives). This method helps learners build durable, long-term recall by encoding each kanji as a vivid mental image rather than an abstract symbol.

## Key Features
- 2,000+ kanji organized by JLPT level (N5 through N1)
- RTK-based mnemonics with memorable keyword associations and stories
- Flashcard quiz mode for active recall practice
- Progress tracking to monitor which kanji you have mastered
- Offline study — no internet connection required after download
- Clean, distraction-free interface optimized for daily review sessions

## Who It's For
- Students preparing for the JLPT N5, N4, N3, N2, or N1 examinations
- Japanese language learners at any stage, from complete beginner to advanced
- Learners who have tried rote memorization and want a more effective, story-based approach
- Anyone working through the Remembering the Kanji textbook and looking for a digital companion
- Busy learners who need short, focused study sessions that can be done anywhere

## Platform
- iOS
- Price: Free
- Works offline
